docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY SZYMANOWICZ, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DEBBAD, SHRAVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $30.00) SERVED OCT-30-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEBBAD, SHRAVAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DEBBAD, SHRAVAN HEARING SET FOR JAN-25-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGEMENT SENT TO VICTOR SZYMANOWITZ RETURNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SZYMANOWICZ, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBBAD, SHRAVAN $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,185.00, NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SHRAVAN DEBBAD IS GRANTED. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. CASE FILED IN IMPROPER VENUE. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE CLAIM IN SACRAMENTO COUNTY. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS), PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR REFUND OF FILING FEE IS "DENIED".
CORRESPONDENCE LETTER RE: CHALLENGE OF VENUE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT DEBBAD, SHRAVAN
DECLARATION BY PLTF OF HIS NEW ADDRESS.
COPY OF NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE MAILED TO PARTIES.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF SZYMANOWICZ, VICTOR
